# Incode Working Sessions

### Discovery Session September/October 2021
The tool allows to create/design new “flows”
*   **Flujos**
    *   Validacion de todo lo necesario (conexión a Renapo, etc) del lado de ellos
    *   Se Invocan los servicios de Incode
    *   En base a lo que devuelve Incode se continúa con el proceso

*   **Pasos**
    *   Paso 1 . “Light”. Top up
    *   Paso 2. “Completo”. Account

*   **Preguntas sobre la consola de “Incode”**
    *   a donde queda la información almacenada
    *   a donde se consulta el nivel de usuario/estatus de usuario en su consola

*   **Dudas**
    *   Consola vs Control (del lado de la plataforma) de toma de desiciones en función del resultado de el flujo configurado
    *   Luego del resultado de Incode, que debe hacer para que el usuario no pueda operar hasta que se “lo libere” desde el lado de compliance

*   **Falta validar**
    *   que se conecte a RENAPO
    *   que se conecte a SSN
*   

**For SACBE Implementaion November 2021** the Integration will be using the Xamarin wrapper for the information capture at the Mobile Layer but then using the API Rest Services in the Backend Platform to handle and validate the data

# Sesión de Clarificaciones

1 ) Temas de Usabilidad Detectados: mensajería al usuario para aclarar el momento de escanear el frente y dorso 
2) Problemática de Video Selfie: detección de voz en el acepto términos y condiciones / problemática de demasiados pasos en la generación del video
3 ) Problemática de detección de fallas en el scan del INE: en los campos que analizamos la respuesta devuelve falla aunque el porcentaje de aciertos sea alto, cuales son las configuraciones qeu deben hacerse y tenerse en cuenta para evitar esta situación
4) Generación de version de IOS: nuestra versión generada para el entorno de pruebas con el nugget de incode incorporado,  nos está generando un crash, con el detalle que te envío en el email a continuación

# Integration Meetings and Notes

notes clarifications from 3-11-2021
notes clarifications from 5-11-2021

**Tamaño del nugget:**
es muy grande y nos incrementa en un 200% (al triple) el tamaño del app, con lo que se supera el máximo permitido para subir a la tienda
\---> sospechamos que se incluyen muchos componentes innecesarios, los otros nuggets de otros proveedores no superan los 10M
\>>>>>> Incode esta analizando el tamaño y los mecanismos para reducirlo, tendrá una estimación para el fin de la semana

**Módulo ID SCAN**
datos incompletos
datos en lugares no esperados (ej: lastname2 en lugar de middlename)
formato indefinido (birthDate)
 (ver imagen adjunta) 
\>>>>>>>>>>>> Incode analizará probables problemas de matcheo entre el ocr y los datos almacenados. Incode enviará un diccionario de datos con ejemplo de que dato de la imagen (INE) se envía en que campo de la información

Otros comentarios de IDs
\>>>> lista de IDs soportados en Estados Unidos

\>>>> Incode debe confirmar si el campo "documentBackSubtype" de la respuesta del OCR es el que se debe utilizar para identificar cual es el tipo de ID qeu el usuario escaneó.
*   Tipos y subtipos de ID:
    *   Pasaporte
        *   Type: Passport
        *   Subtype: NATIONAL\_PASSPORT
    *   INE
        *   Type: VoterIdentification
        *   Subtype: VOTER\_IDENTIFICATION\_CARD
    *   FM
        *   Type: ResidenceDocument
        *   Subtype: PERMANENT\_RESIDENCE\_CARD, TEMPORARY\_RESIDENCE\_CARD

\>>>>> Incode debe proveer un diccionario de datos para permitir matchear la informacion que devuelve este campo vs cual es el id de la vida real
*   Campos INE favor de consultar archivo anexo

[Campos INE.pdf](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/37ceebf6-56f4-483f-9ca9-1f3103076149/Campos%20INE.pdf)

**Módulo de Validación de Curp**
*   este módulo consulta contra RENAPO? no vimos este punto en el detalle de los controles que realiza el módiulo  (ver imagen adjunta, se cubrió la información sensible)

*   no se reciben los datos que se obtienen a través del CURP (entendemos que esto es un servicio separado que está disponible en el modulo web pero no se encuentra integrado al nugget)
\>>>> Incode analiza si se podrá incorporar en el sdk de Xamarin en el método que devuelve la validez del curp, además del curp, la información de los datos del CURP que devuelve RENAPO
*   **El response de la validación de CURP sí se puede agregar en el wrapper de Xamarin para que del mismo SDK consulten este resultado. ETA finales de noviembre.**

**Dudas puntuales de Integración**
Cuando se crea la sesión de Onboarding, se recibe un objeto que tiene InteviewID and Token, de Xamarin se necesita el InterviewID para lanzar los servicios dentro del nugget, pero para lanzar los servicios rest, se necesita el Token, ambos componentes están "vivos" a lo largo de la sesión?  Como se identifican/obtienen si la sesión se expira?
\>>>> Incode confirma para reiniciar session se debe utilizar el api rest

# Incomm

# General Details
Incomm is a Provider that allows the reload of cash to an account using a BarCode or a Card Swipe
From the providers documentation the following description of the services:
_Users will be provided with a barcode displayed on their smartphone which they will scan at a retailer’s POS terminal and provide payment. Once the transaction is complete, their GPR (or a Closed-loop) card account will be loaded with the specified amount. Please refer to the “Scan Reload Business Scope” document for more business details about this solution._
Incomm provides different types of integration:
*   the reload through the integration with a Card Processor / System of Record (e.g. Galileo)
*   the ability to execute the reload transactions having the control as processor

### Documentation Drive

[

drive.google.com

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1o\_0gn2LhRMr1M0CVVSmz-YL\_51KOiO82

](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1o_0gn2LhRMr1M0CVVSmz-YL_51KOiO82)

# Technical Details
The integration with Incode has two parts:
1) Integrate to execute the reload and obtain the necessary information (merchants, locations, barcode) to perform such load in the user’s account: The overal set of APIs that cover the scan reload service are called VRS = Vanilla Reload Service
2) Integrate to exchange the messages related to the reload and the status of the lifecyucle of the reload transactions. This Services are detaled in Issuer Interface Specification

## Overall Graphic
The following graphic detail the overall process and the different layers involved in the Incomm integration. Bear in mind that there´s two possible implementations
1) With Leap as the Processor
2) With Galileo as the Processor

[

drive.google.com

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VhOErFOjDOV9\_-ZJX1sRPJ4hY0BWv\_AG/view?usp=sharing

](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VhOErFOjDOV9_-ZJX1sRPJ4hY0BWv_AG/view?usp=sharing)

## Provider Documentation

## Authentication for APIS
1. the Token for the authentication for all the API calls needs to be obtained using Oauth2
    1. see **_OAUTH Integration_** section in the **API Specification** the endpoint to obtain the bearer token in sandbox is the following: [https://apiuat.incomm.com/oauth/token](https://apiuat.incomm.com/oauth/token)
    2. The credentials to generate the base64 authorization to obtain the token are as follow
        1. For Direct Integration Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26297](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26297))
        2. For Galileo Integration Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26337](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26337))
3\. Once the bearer token is provided, it needs to be used in the subsequent calls for the APIS, until it expires, where you need to request the new one repeating the steps in these section.
1. 4\. For specific parameters that need to be encrypted, the AES Key is provided for the program.
    1. Please review the section _AES-256 Encryption of payloads_ of the [https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-API-Specification-document--%E2%96%B6---%5BinlineExtension%5D](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-API-Specification-document--%E2%96%B6---%5BinlineExtension%5D)
    2. The original AES KEY was provided as part of the authentication details, please review:
        1. For Direct Integration Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26297](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26297))
        2. For Galileo Integration Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26337](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26337))
[![](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/images/icons/issuetypes/story.svg)
it is necessary to obtain and handle the AES key througout its life. When the AES Key used is expired, the apis will provide a 400 response with the new AES Key, so the new key needs to be used for the subsequent calls.
](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-665)[](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-665)1. [](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-665)[HWAY-665](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-665) - Maintain AES Authentication for Incomm CLOSED

## APIs to Be Used

for **sandbox** the base url of the APIs is [https://apiuat.incomm.com/fs/v1/](https://apiuat.incomm.com/fs/v1/)
for **PROD** the base url for the APIs is [https://api.incomm.com/fs/v1/](https://apiuat.incomm.com/fs/v1/)

### VRS Scan
### Generate Barcode Load with Cash in Retailers
For the Load implementation, there will be three basic APIs that will need to be used
1. **List of Merchants = /services/vrs/merchants**
    1. This API Provides the list of Merchants from Incomm. This needs to be used to set the list of retailres of the Incomm network available for hway users. Create List of Cash-Load Retailers for the Incomm Network
    2. for the details of this APIs parameterssee section 6.1 Retrieve list of VRS merchants in the [https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-API-Specification-document--%E2%96%B6---%5BinlineExtension%5D](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-API-Specification-document--%E2%96%B6---%5BinlineExtension%5D)
2. **Request/Reload =**
[![](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/images/icons/issuetypes/story.svg)
This API provides the barcode information and executes the actual load to the Account.
](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-650)[![](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/images/icons/issuetypes/story.svg)](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-649)

1. [HWAY-649](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-649) - Execute the Load to Account from Incomm Backlog
2. see section 6.2 Request reload in the [https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-API-Specification-document--%E2%96%B6---%5BinlineExtension%5D](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-API-Specification-document--%E2%96%B6---%5BinlineExtension%5D)
3. Specific Parameters Details
4. `primaryAccountNumber = PRN of the Account to load, must be encripted using AES key provided`

### Transactions Mesagging Exchange
### Implementation for Direct Integration (see Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26357](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26357))
[![](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/images/icons/issuetypes/story.svg)
To handle the Transactions exchange when Leap is processing the transactions in real time, the mechanisms of Messaging exchange need to be set in place. Incomm will send the Mesagges to a specific URL provided by Leap : Create Messaging Listener Service for Incomm
](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-664)1. [HWAY-664](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/browse/HWAY-664) - Create Messaging Listener Service for Incomm IN PROGRESS
2. See sections 2 and 3 in [https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-Issuer-Interface-Spedicification-%E2%96%B6-%5BinlineExtension%5D](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-Issuer-Interface-Spedicification-%E2%96%B6-%5BinlineExtension%5D) for the details on how to provide the authentication for Incomm to provide the messaging format
3. The scenario to consider in the use case is “Value Insertion” . TheMessage Type will be the following:
4. MsgType
5. Preauthorization = prevalins or preauthrecharge
6. Authorization = valins
7. Reversal = revvalins
8. See section _5 Transaction API_ in [https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-Issuer-Interface-Spedicification-%E2%96%B6-%5BinlineExtension%5D](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/1871511553/Incomm#%5BinlineExtension%5D-Issuer-Interface-Spedicification-%E2%96%B6-%5BinlineExtension%5D) to review the specific details of the Value Insertion
9. In the document with examples of the Messages, the specific details of the Value insertion scenario are in the following pages
    1. 6 Pre-Authorization Value Insertion .......................................................................17
    2. 7 Value Insertion......................................................................................................19
    3. 8 Value Insertion Reversal ......................................................................................21
    4. 
10. IMPORTANT It is necesary to consider that Incomm will “reverse” the transaction if no response is sent after 8 minutes
## Notes from Incomm Technical Sessions
## First Session
> request reload - extra security for pci (pan)  
> customerID = sepuede ignorar  
> UPCSelector = se puede ignorar  
> primaryAcountNumber = prn = debe estar encripatado aes-key exchange (ver documento)  
> cardShortName = se puede poner cualquier texto que reprensente el programa  
> loadAmount = monto de la transaccion, pero queda sobre escrito por lo que el cliente dice especificamente en el store (en el POS) - se puede usar el transacittion amount que devuelve Incomm en lugar de este como monto de la transaccion  
> _Campos que estan siendo implemenados_  
> _requestLocationRadius = radio geografico de uso, se utiliza pra proteccion de fraude. Se puede utilizar logica para compararlo con el reloadlocation_  
> Se aconseja como esto es una transaccion con card not present es **obligar a la habiliacion del geolocation on the reload**  
> contextData = atributo para enviar datos ue se necesiten en la response  
>   
>   
## Second Session
> Se necesita construir un backend interface para integrar la parte del pago propiamente dicha con Incomm  
> el backend va a intercambiar  
> Request Barcode  
> UPC = identificador de incomm  
> 19 digitos del barcode identifica donde Incomm tiene que mandar el tráfico  
> Proxy Number  
> value insertion  
> code  
> Se necesitaran dierentes program Ids, partner ids, es decir y configuracion diferente del lado de Incomm par identificar los dos programas  
> Tenemos que proveer 2 Static Endpoints=  
> 1 para dev/qa  
> 1 para prod  
> authentication model  
> Leap lo debe elegir  
> user/pwd  
> oauth2.0  
> bearer token  
> (should expire tipically every 24 hours)  
> Puede o no necesitarse que whitelisteen  
> Incomm with Galileo = onboard a new partner = hay que avisar que lo vamos a usar  
> Se necesita configurar algo de Galileo  
> Swipe debe  
> PWD credentials  
> 05172022LF


## Sandbox

| URL = [https://apiuat.incomm.com/fs/v1/services/vrs/](https://apiuat.incomm.com/fs/v1/services/vrs/) |
| --- |
| apiPartnerName:"VRS-LEAPFINANCIAL", |
|   ClientID: fc12d6e0-eae4-4699-9cdc-c00db519079a |
|   ClientSecret: GxhuM2do2h09rx2c |
| Original (MAY 2022) (EXPIRED)<br>  AESKey: EE71CFFE6B5C67A5B445ACA68AD4091E199D31C44EC3B6BED34184C74D7D4B3D |
| New (AUGUST 2022)<br>AES key: DC99B022F6CC24C560AAD22E7F66379E7C7C80AEA8E7A1F9AD05466076A41477 |

## PROD
For security reasons check drive link
PWD = Incomm + Year of file + last month of the year + Go + !

**Instructions**
Users will prepare an Authorization header whose value will be a Base64 encoding of
“SampleClientID:SampleSecret” string. Basic prefix can be used before this encoded value in the header.
Example “Basic ODg1LTMxN2RkN2Vj” inside Authorization header.
API will be using client credentials grant type and will respond back with a bearer token and additional
meta information about the token like when it will expire and when it was issued.
Users need to supply the grant type information, in this case, client\_credentials as a URL encoded body

in the request. The content type of the request payload is Content-Type application/x-www-form-
urlencoded.

URL to get the access token in UAT
[https://apiuat.incomm.com/oauth/token](https://apiuat.incomm.com/oauth/token)

Sample CURL request for getting the access/bearer token
curl --location --request POST '[https://apiuat.incomm.com/oauth/token](https://apiuat.incomm.com/oauth/token)' \\
\--header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \\
\--header 'Authorization: Basic U2FtcGxlQ2xpZW50SUQ6U2FtcGxlU2VjcmV0' \\
\--data-urlencode 'grant\_type=client\_credentials'

# Direct Integration - SPIL

Leap Financial will be integrated with Incomm to be able to process the loads to the user / account identified that are related to the barcodes generated for the selected retailers through Incomm VRS integration
In order to Process the value insertions, Leap needs to develop a listener or “call back”
This direct integration is also called SPIL = Service Provider Interface Layer, where leap is the processor of the value insertion transaction and has the responsibility to update the user’s balance with this value insertion.

With Leap Financial ´s ability to receive “value insertions” the cycle of the load is closed,:
*   the user uses the Incomm VRS barcode to load in the retailers,
*   Incomm notifies / validates that value insertion with Leap Financial,
*   Leap Financial finally -if valid- will insert the value, this is, update user´s balance
This value insertions will be sent by Incomm with a series of premises previously agreed according to the Requirements Document signed with them
See below requirements from the Google Drive

[

drive.google.com

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1dUwiy2Bf5YaLBqTP10TWDWkglkhgSPfB/view?usp=sharing

](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1dUwiy2Bf5YaLBqTP10TWDWkglkhgSPfB/view?usp=sharing)

Testing Details
In order to be able to test the callback and hence “close the cycle” a CURL is provided to be used in tools such as postman, and emulate Incomm's call
Please see below the details for the specific parameters that need to be modified for this example to work

```swift
curl --location --request POST "https://qa.nomas.cash/callbackinterface/IncommCallback" ^
--header "Authorization: Basic SW5jb21tMjAyMjppeTU2dGE2ZmRxaW9pd2Vt" ^
--header "Content-Type: application/json" ^
--data-raw "{
  \"ServiceProviderTxn\": {
    \"Version\": \"4\",
    \"Request\": {
      \"MsgType\": \"valins\",
      \"DateTimeInfo\": {
        \"DateValue\": \"20190529\",
        \"TimeValue\": \"035128\",
        \"TimeZoneValue\": \"EST\"
      },
      \"IncommRefNum\": \"14c9fe97-e604-46d5-9658-089897cefc454\",
      \"Origin\": {
        \"MerchName\": \"InCommTest\",
        \"StoreInfo\": {
          \"StoreID\": \"3631\",
          \"TermID\": \"CLV36300\",
          \"StoreLoc\": {
            \"Address1\": \"25 William St\",
            \"Address2\": \"Suite M100\",
            \"City\": \"Atlanta\",
            \"State\": \"GA\",
            \"Zip\": \"30303\"
          }
        },
        \"MerchRefNum\": \"012403\",
        \"LocaleInfo\": {
          \"CountryCode\": \"US\",
          \"CurrencyCode\": \"USD\",
          \"Language\": \"EN\"
        },
        \"POSInfo\": {
          \"EntryMode\": \"030\",
          \"ConditionCode\": \"00\"
        },
        \"SourceInfo\": \"POS\"
      },
      \"Product\": {
        \"Track1\": \";6009004120297973\",
        \"Track2\": \"6009004120297973\",
        \"SPNumber\": \"19166019888|oEx4PA\",
        \"Fee\": 0,
        \"Value\": {
          \"Money\": {
            \"Amount\": 38,
            \"CurrencyCode\": \"USD\"
          }
        }
      },
      \"Extension\": [
        {
          \"Name\": \"Description\",
          \"Value\": \"InComm JSON Interface Spec\"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}"
```

Parameters
`\"IncommRefNum\": \"14c9fe97-e604-46d5-9658-089897cefc454\",` = should be any unique guid
do not repeat in two different calls
`\"MsgType\": \"valins\",` = the specific type of message. The values can be prevalins / valins / revvalins
prevalins is a pre validation request, not always present in the real messaging
valins is the actual value insertion, that will last a certain amount of time before being definitive
revvalins, the reversal of the value insertion, only possible by a certain amount of time
`\"SPNumber\": \"19166019888|oEx4PA\",` the transaction / account identifier,
related specifically with the barcode, with the following format Users' Phone Number + Pipe + operation number. Example = `19166019888|oEx4PA`
`\"Amount\": 38,` the amount of the value insertion,
needs to be the same used in the barcode generation for the transaction to be successful

## Technical Details
The integration consists on creating Apps, Groups, Campaings and in the end produce “smart links” and use them in different elements such as the Hway mobile App itself, emails, and similiar.
This integration has two sides, the Mobile integration and the Backend integration
### Mobile Integration For HWAY
1. Implemented using Xamarin SDK
2. Configuration in Kochava Dashboard (see page:)
3. Configure Base URLs in App Configuration Files
4. Configure App GUIDs in App Configuration Files
### Backend Integration

1\. Based on the Configuration in Kochava Dashboard performed for Mobile, use the smart links as baseline, for example
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/294caf6b-3fae-4040-8230-9027d3e489b7/image-20220920-221028.png)
2\. The smart links related to the apps/campaigns are handled through the Kochava APis to enrich with other parameters needed in the attribution information for the apps
3\. The Smart Links configuration in the Kochava Dahsboard needs to include mandatory fields for this attributrion information to work
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/32c47ccc-615e-40b0-98a4-8e4e2e2fde87/image-20220920-221329.png)
4\. Backend has a spedific Configuration fopr kochava that can be found **in the child pages**
[Claudia Bolanos](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/people/557058:4d2023d6-97c0-4108-ba2b-cb62c1b0531c?ref=confluence) to provide more detail detail
### Mobile Integration for NOMASCAsh
Using flutter package from Kochava [Alejandro Pirola (Unlicensed)](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/people/5ea5b3cab882f90bae040d63?ref=confluence) to provide detail

# Kochava Features

# General Details

# Technical Details
## Handling Reinstals
(sent from Kochava Support Team)
For app reinstalls, by default, our system is designed to deduplicate installs from the same device in perpetuity. When the SDK is launched it will only pull the deep link values from the original source of attribution. This is why you were getting the old deep link data from the previous link when reinstalling. 
You can change this default behavior by adjusting the Install Reprocessing lookback window. With Install Reprocessing adjusted, a user who had previously installed the app can be re-attributed to the new link. This will allow the SDK to pull the deep link values from the new link instead of the previous attribution source. 
To do this you will need to create a [VPPN](https://support.kochava.com/campaign-management/create-a-private-network/) for the SmartLinks. Once created, you will need to add a [Partner Configuration](https://support.kochava.com/campaign-management/create-a-kochava-certified-postback/?ljs=English) for the VPPN and configure the [reconciliation settings](https://support.kochava.com/campaign-management/default-reconciliation-settings/). The Install Reprocessing Lookback Window can be adjusted to anywhere between 1 day and 365 days. If you choose the shortest window of 1 day, the only instance it would not work as intended is if a user installs the app from one link, uninstalls the app, and then reinstalls it from another link all within a 24-hour period. 

## Kochava Events
The Events that are avialable to be analyzed and provide the analytics reports are described in the following link
[https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/)
In the Section [Tracking Events:](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#collapseTrackingEvents)
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/9bd78324-7217-4de6-bee3-16aac24bbfc5/image-20221027-145455.png)

## Standard Events:
Standard events are built by first selecting a standard event type and then setting any applicable standard parameters you wish to include with the event. For example, you might choose a **Purchase** standard event type and set values for the **Price** and **Name** parameters. There are a variety of standard event types to choose from and dozens of standard parameters available. When creating a standard event, you only need to set values for the parameters you wish to track. A maximum of 16 parameters can be set.
1. Create an event object using the desired standard event type.
2. Set the desired parameter value(s) within the event object.
3. Pass the event object to the tracker’s Send Event method.

#### Example (Standard Event with Standard Parameters) —
*   [v4](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane7-0)
*   [v3 (Legacy)](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane7-1)

```auto
var koEvent = KochavaTracker.Instance.BuildEventWithEventType(KochavaTrackerEventType.Purchase);koEvent.SetName("Gold Token");koEvent.SetPrice(0.99);koEvent.Send();
```

*   

#### Example (Standard Event with Standard and Custom Parameters) —
*   [v4](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane8-0)
*   [v3 (Legacy)](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane8-1)

```auto
var koEvent = KochavaTracker.Instance.BuildEventWithEventType(KochavaTrackerEventType.LevelComplete);koEvent.SetName("The Deep Dark Forest");koEvent.SetCustomNumberValue("attempts", 3);koEvent.SetCustomNumberValue("score", 12000);koEvent.Send();
```

*   

If you wish to use a custom event type with standard parameters, use a custom event name string within your event constructor in place of a standard event type.

For a detailed list of standard event types and parameters, see: [Post Install Event Examples](https://support.kochava.com/reference-information/post-install-event-examples)
## Custom Events:
For scenarios where the standard event types and standard parameters do not meet your needs, custom events can be used. To instrument a custom event, pass the event’s name and data (which can also be serialized JSON) to the tracker’s Send Event method.

#### Example (Custom Event with Custom Parameters) —
*   [v4](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane9-0)
*   [v3 (Legacy)](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane9-1)

```auto
var koEvent = KochavaTracker.Instance.BuildEventWithEventName("Enemy Defeated");koEvent.SetCustomStringValue("enemy", "The Angry Ogre");koEvent.SetCustomStringValue("reward", "Gold Token");koEvent.Send();
```

*   

#### Example (Send a Custom Event with Only a Name, no Event Data) —
*   [v4](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane10-0)
*   [v3(Legacy)](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane10-1)

```auto
KochavaTracker.Instance.SendEvent("Player Defeated");
```

*   

#### Example (Send a Custom Event with Event Data) —
*   [v4](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane11-0)
*   [v3 (Legacy)](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane11-1)

```auto
KochavaTracker.Instance.SendEventWithString("Player Defeated", "Angry Ogre");
```

*   

#### Example (Send a Custom Event with Serialized JSON Data) —
*   [v4](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane12-0)
*   [v3 (Legacy)](https://support.kochava.com/sdk-integration/xamarin-sdk-integration/xamarin-using-the-sdk/#ert_pane12-1)

```auto
var dictionary = new JObject();dictionary.Add("enemy", "Angry Ogre");KochavaTracker.Instance.SendEventWithDictionary("Player Defeated", dictionary);
```

*   

**NOTE:** No custom event name pre-registration is required. However, a maximum of 100 unique event names can be tracked within the Kochava dashboard (including any standard event types also used), so keep this in mind as you create new custom event names.

## Full List of Standard Events Available
The following link contains the full list of Events Avilable for tracking
[https://support.kochava.com/reference-information/post-install-event-examples/](https://support.kochava.com/reference-information/post-install-event-examples/)

# Create Event for Account Creation in HWAY

In order to create an event in kochava, the following endpoint needs to be used
`http://control.kochava.com/track/json`

This endpoint needs to be executed every time a user creates an account
This will register an Event in Kochava of the defined type, for the defined platform, version, device and app
## EXAMPLE
The following is an example of curl of the event creation

```auto
curl --location "http://control.kochava.com/track/json" ^
--header "Authentication-Key: 6556DA26-3765-41FC-B015-B99E74F2E690" ^
--header "Content-Type: application/json" ^
--data "{
    \"data\": {
        \"usertime\": 1669752096,
        \"app_version\": \"1.0.0\",
        \"device_ver\": \"iPhone-iOS-15.5.0\",
        \"device_type\": \"iPhone\",
        \"os_version\": \"15.5.0\",
        \"device_ids\": {
            \"idfa\": \"F54C1B12-6B0F-4C33-8820-562F242600A3\"
        },
        \"device_ua\": \"Backend\",
        \"event_name\": \"cip_L0\",
        \"origination_ip\": \"179.38.143.157\",
        \"currency\": \"USD\",
        \"event_data\": {
            \"SubscriberId\": \"86e87a4bf28048b190b1ce7638eda613\"
        }
    },
    \"action\": \"event\",
    \"kochava_app_id\": \"kotest-deeplink-ios-rfs2wl5m\",
    \"kochava_device_id\": \"KI1669817127TEC2785074EDD4AFDAD90CD787D40EFC3\"
}"
```

## Authentication
The authentication is provided by an API Key to be obtained from kochava dashboard.
The API Keys are created for users in kochava, TBD if we need to create an api key “abstract” for backend, or we can use one for the uses
For testing purposes one of the TA user API KEYS = 027A0B7B-4833-038D-D76D-C847D71D307F
The following is the detail of the fields and the values the account creation event should carry

| **Field**<br> | **Description**<br> | **Value to be set**<br> |
| ---| ---| --- |
| `usertime` | date time stamp in EPOC format | the time stamp of the account creation in the epoc format |
| `app_version` | version of the app | version of hway app (obtained from mobile layer) |
| `device_ver` | version of OS | (obtained from mobile layer) |
| `device_type` | platfor of the device | (obtained from mobile layer) |
| `device_ids` | collection of ids provided for the specific device, values may include<br>`idfa`<br><br>**(check others with mobile, what is the value for android)** | the corresponding device id value the name of the values in the array depend on the OS of the device |
| `device_ua` | Fixed Value | Backend |
| `event_name` | Fixed Value, corresponding to the event name set up in kochava dashboard | Registration Complete |
| `origination_ip` | Fixed Value | **For dev/qa:** `179.38.143.157`<br>**For PROD:** TBD |
| `currency` | Do not Include (not needed) |  |
| `event_data` | collection of data to be included in the event. Values will include:<br>`SubscriberId` | Susbcirber Id of the user that has created the account succesfully |
| `action` | Fixed Value = event | `event` |
| `kochava_app_id` | Fixed value, tht will depend on the PLATFORM ENVIRONMENT and the OS of the Device | Depending on the version of the OS provided by mobile<br>**For dev/qa:**<br>ANDROID= kotest-deeplink-android-aft9v5<br>IOS = kotest-deeplink-ios-rfs2wl5m<br><br>**For PROD:**<br>ANDROID = kohway-prod-android-a3mi0y9<br>IOS = kohway-prod-ios-gej<br> |
| `kochava_device_id` | Device ID registered in the device by Kochava when the Kochava integration portion of the mobile code is executed within the mobile app | (obtained from mobile layer)<br> |

# Starting With Kochava and Universal Links

This guide is intended to provide a quick view on how to start using universal links with kochava, from the start
## Pre-conditions
You were provided a user id for Kochava dashboard = [https://go.kochava.com/](https://go.kochava.com/)
If you need a Kochava Id ask the administrators Francisco Candia and Vanesa Vilas

## 1 - Create your Apps
Create Apps in Kochava, you MUST create
*   one app for each platform to use (e.g. One for Android and one for IOS)
*   one for each environment
The following guide is provided by Kochava = [https://support.kochava.com/create-manage-apps/create-edit-apps/](https://support.kochava.com/create-manage-apps/create-edit-apps/)
### Example Apps:
you can review the already existing apps as example =
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/d73f4ba3-a291-4e97-b901-ceecc2ac8dc8/image-20230628-134616.png)![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/ba7175de-4f1d-46a0-9e18-15644da86bb8/image-20230628-134839.png)

## 2 - Create your Apps Group
Once you created te Apps, you will need to group them in an App Group in order to handle them as a unique element. This will allow Kochava to identify the apps within the same campaingns, links, later on.
The following guide is provided by Kochava [https://support.kochava.com/create-manage-apps/creating-and-editing-app-groups/](https://support.kochava.com/create-manage-apps/creating-and-editing-app-groups/)
### Example Groups:
You can review the already existing groups as example =
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/55e79f2c-9b02-42bb-90ce-9c713afe2a5c/image-20230628-135407.png)
## 3 - Universal Link Setup
Once you have your apps and app group crated, you need to configure the universal links. This is a series of steps that need to be done within your integration with kochava sdk, within your mobile app project, but also some steps need to involve requesting changes to Kochava and sending them some files for information.
The step by step guide to Universal Links by Kochava is the Following = [https://support.kochava.com/links-overview/adding-universal-link-or-app-link-support/](https://support.kochava.com/links-overview/adding-universal-link-or-app-link-support/)

## 4 - Requesting Univeral Link Setup to Kochava
The following elements needs to be prepared to send to Kochava when requesting in the step 6 of the above guide
Described below each element of the list, In **purple** you will see the examples already sent to kochava for hway implementation
**Chosen custom subdomain name:** [**your-brand-name.smart.link**](http://your-brand-name.smart.link)**.**
PROD= [hway.smart.link](http://hway.smart.link)
DEV = [hway-dev.smart.link](http://hway-dev.smart.link)
**For iOS: Apple App Site Association file.** 

[ios\_association files.zip](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/d3036176-9da1-4606-a105-1586c5affb8e/ios_association%20files.zip)

Attached DEV and PROD
**For Android: Digital Asset Links file.**

[android\_digital assets links file.zip](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/9d0b7ab6-fa3a-40ad-b11d-594b64e86480/android_digital%20assets%20links%20file.zip)

Attached both DEV and PROD
**The iOS and Android Kochava App IDs.** 
Android= kohway-prod-android-a3mi0y9 / IOS = kohway-prod-ios-gej
**The iOS and Android Kochava Test App IDs.**
Android = kotest-deeplink-android-aft9v5  / IOS = kotest-deeplink-ios-rfs2wl5m
**Product Name:**
hway
**Product Icon**: _note: this is the icon that also goes in the store_
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/35cb0d17-b4a8-45db-82a4-90bf3de23a68/image-20230628-142807.png)
**Fallback destinations:**
iOS:  app store. =  [https://apps.apple.com/us/app/h-way/id1635450512](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/h-way/id1635450512)
Android: app store. =  [https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.leapfinancial.hway.numi.android&hl=en\_US&gl=US](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.leapfinancial.hway.numi.android&hl=en_US&gl=US)
Other: [https://www.h-way.com/](https://www.h-way.com/)

## 5 - Validate Universal Link Enabled by Kochava
Once Kochava support team confirms that the universal link is enabled, you can esasily confirn if its working by using an Apple tool that returns the association file of a domain.
This tool can be found in the following link [https://branch.io/resources/aasa-validator/](https://branch.io/resources/aasa-validator/)
If the form returns the information you provided to Kochava, this means that the universal link was properly configured in kochava servers.
### Example of Universal Link Properly configured
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/3cef0df0-4188-44f6-bb65-7788c3870ab5/image-20230628-141244.png)
### Example of Universal Link Not Configured
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/00e41ebb-86ef-4542-8810-152b545ee16e/image-20230628-141338.png)
## 6 - Setting Up The New Smart Link with Universal Link Enabled
Once you validated the universal link properly configured in Kochava, you can create the new smart link with the universal link enabled
Follow from Step 10 in the Guide of Creatinng a Smart Link = [https://support.kochava.com/links-overview/adding-universal-link-or-app-link-support/](https://support.kochava.com/links-overview/adding-universal-link-or-app-link-support/)
Examples
The Following examples can be reviewd for existing universal links =
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/9f8d02e1-a52c-451e-a077-ddfc35d9a1d4/image-20230628-141738.png)

## 7 - Report the New Links Created
You need to report the links created for backend (Numi Platform) team to configure them and to the marketing team to use them in their campagings
The pertinent information to be shared is the actual link with its id
### Examples
The following example can be reviewed for the information to be shared
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/a9d36869-9523-4f4a-87a6-dd4f723c178f/image-20230628-142235.png)

# Backend Configuration Data Dictionary of Hway

Note: this page is outdated, te Universal Link handling needs to be included

| **Description**<br> | **Key**<br> | **Value for DEV/QA**<br> | **Value for PROD**<br> |
| ---| ---| ---| --- |
| Url of the API's Kochava | Url | [https://links.api.kochava.com](https://links.api.kochava.com) | Delete |
| Credentials for API | ApiKey | 6556DA26-3765-41FC-B015-B99E74F2E690 | Delete |
| SmartLink name for OperationAPI | SmartLinkName\_Operation | HwayOperationLink | Delete |
| SmartLink Baseline URL of OperationAPI | SmartLinkUrl\_Operation | [https://smart.link/a9gvc6exuh8fs](https://smart.link/a9gvc6exuh8fs) | [https://smart.link/i7613gkdyhvsz](https://smart.link/i7613gkdyhvsz)<br> |
| SmartLink name for StorePayAPI | SmartLinkName\_StorePay | StorePayLink | _Empty_ |
| SmartLink Baseline URL of StorePayAPI | SmartLinkUrl\_StorePay | _Empty_ | _Empty_ |
| Custom parameter for AffiliatePartnersId | SmartLinkParameter\_AffiliatePartnersId | affiliatePartnersId | affiliatePartnersId |
| Custom parameter for AffiliatePartnersData | SmartLinkParameter\_AffiliatePartnersData | affiliatePartnersData | affiliatePartnersData |
| Custom parameter for ReferralId | SmartLinkParameter\_ReferralId | referralId | referralId |
| Custom parameter ReferralData | SmartLinkParameter\_ReferralData | referralData | referralData |
| Custom parameter for RefId | SmartLinkParameter\_RefId | refId | refId |
| Custom parameter for Checksum | SmartLinkParameter\_Checksum | checksum | checksum |
| Custom parameter for Action | SmartLinkParameter\_Action | action | action |

The custom parameters are related to the parameters defined in the smartLinks. These are included in a deeplink. For example, in the case of operation deeplink, refId will set operationId and so on.

# Implementation details

Before adding a SmartLink you need to creates the iOS and Android apps and create a group with both.
Add a New SmartLink in Kochava Console.
1. You can select a Campaign o create during registration
2. Select a App Group
3. For app iOS section: Fill “DESTINATION IF APP IS NOT INSTALLED” for download app (plastic URL or apple store). Fill “DESTINATION IF APP IS INSTALLED” with URL [https://deeplinkdev.leapfinancial.com/](https://deeplinkdev.leapfinancial.com/) in case dev/qa environment or [https://deeplink.leapfinancial.com](https://deeplink.leapfinancial.com/) in case production environment.
4. Bundles by environment can be listed:
    1. [https://deeplinkdev.leapfinancial.com/apple-app-site-association](https://deeplinkdev.leapfinancial.com/apple-app-site-association)
    2. [http://deeplink.leapfinancial.com/apple-app-site-association](http://deeplink.leapfinancial.com/apple-app-site-association)
5. For app Android section: Fill “DESTINATION IF APP IS NOT INSTALLED” for download app (plastic URL or apple store). Fill “DESTINATION IF APP IS INSTALLED” with URL \[DataScheme\]://deeplinkdev.leapfinancial.com/ in case dev/qa environment or \[DataScheme\]://deeplink.leapfinancial.com in case production environment. For example hway://deeplinkdev.leapfinancial.com/
6. In “All Other Platforms (Catch-all)“ section, sets Destination when the SmartLink is used outside iOS or Android.
7. And add custom parameters:

| **Name**<br> | **Value**<br> |
| ---| --- |
| refId | {refId} |
| affiliatePartnersId | {affiliatePartnersId} |
| affiliatePartnersData | {affiliatePartnersData} |
| referralId | {referralId} |
| referralData | {referralData} |
| checksum | {checksum} |
| action | {action} |

7\. Save de SmartLink and copy the identifier
8.

…

# Mastercard Send

Mastercard Send is the solutin from Mastercard to implement Person to Person Account to Card money transfers
The MS implementation is intended to cover the OCT flow both
*   domestic
*   crossborder
## Documentation Drive
The following drive contains the documentation related to this integration

# Mastercard Send Leapfinancial Implementation

Date Started = August 2023

## Project in Mastercard Developer Site
[https://developer.mastercard.com/project/50235](https://developer.mastercard.com/project/50235)
(request access to TA if needed)
## Environment Details
There’s three levels of environments, Sandbox, MFT (Mastercard Test Facility) and PRODUCTION
Sandbox is for general and free use, and is also the starting point of the credentials. The credentials are firstly created within the dashboard in Sandbox, and **_then they get converted to MFT_** when they are validated in an ongoing project.
MFT is the testing environment when there is already an oingoing project with Mastercard, **_this involves the generation and provision of a partner ID from Mastercard side,_** that will later be used as part of the APIs enpdpionts (see [API Execution Details](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/2055012353/Mastercard+Send+Leapfinancial+Implementation#%5BinlineExtension%5DAPI-Execution-Details)) . The keys are also related to the Client ID that is provided when the project is
PRODUCTION is the production environment, the keys need to be genreated within the same project and validated with Mastercard Implementation Team, and associated do the Client ID
## Authentication Details per each Environment
Per Authentication the Details used are:
1. Consumer Key = provided when the credentials are created
2. Password = provided when the credentials are created
3. Certificate = provided when the credentials are created
4. Partner ID = provided when the project starts and sandbox gets converted to MFT (see [API Execution Details](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/2055012353/Mastercard+Send+Leapfinancial+Implementation#%5BinlineExtension%5DAPI-Execution-Details)) .
5. Client ID = provided when the credentials are created (in the credentials email)
**Sandbox / MFT**
1. **Sandbox VALIDATED WITH MASTERCARD = MFT**
    1. Once the project started, the Mastercard team needs to bind the project in developer site, to the account for leapfinancial in Mastercard.
    2. As per August 2023 the Sandbox project is binded to the following Partner ID provided by mastercard, to promote sandbox to MFT= **ptnr\_YhyfbMJswvmznGRaKc7-LrNPIzB** _to be used as part of the endpoints path_
    3. The current account binded has the following consumer key associated and the private key for Sandbox

# Oauth Athentication Details

The following link contains the documentation for Oauth Authentication required by Mastercard
[https://developer.mastercard.com/platform/documentation/security-and-authentication/using-oauth-1a-to-access-mastercard-apis/](https://developer.mastercard.com/platform/documentation/security-and-authentication/using-oauth-1a-to-access-mastercard-apis/)

### How to configure the environment and the keys to make it work in postman
*   Go to your Mastercard Developers Project Dashboard and copy the consumer key into the the **consumerKey** variable
    *   see consumer key for leapfinancial in authentication details page = [Authentication Details](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/2055012353/Mastercard+Send+Leapfinancial+Implementation#Authentication-Details)
*   The private key is a little trickier. We need to convert the P12 key into an RSA key. To do that, first download the P12 key file
    *   see the p12 key file for leapfinancial in the authentication details page = [Authentication Details](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/2055012353/Mastercard+Send+Leapfinancial+Implementation#Authentication-Details)
*   Then convert the P12 key into an RSA key using the following command:
*   `openssl pkcs12 -in 'mykey.p12' | openssl rsa -out myrsa.key`
    *   replace mykey.p12 with the name of leapfinancial’s key from the previous step
    *   If the **openssl** command isn't recognised, you can download the toolkit from [here](https://www.openssl.org/)
*   When prompted, use the password/passphrase you configured when you first created the key
    *   see password and passphrase in the authentication details page = [Authentication Details](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/NUMI/pages/2055012353/Mastercard+Send+Leapfinancial+Implementation#Authentication-Details)
*   Now you can open the `myrsa.key` file you just created and copy the entire string value into the **privateKey** variable.
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/8441cd8e-9f15-4687-9d12-e0b44073551a/image-20230812-161825.png)

*   *   These keys are picked up through the **{{privateKey}}** and **{{consumerKey}}** variables in the Authorisation tab for each Collection which has already been configured to use OAuth 1.0
*   Make sure you set the Environment before you start calling the API endpoints in the collections
*   Depending on how you have your collection configured, when changing environments, you may need to update the private key setting the RSA key content in the collection information, for the corresponding to each environment (sandbox or prod)
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/979e4a7d-e569-45cc-89b0-ce73fe9700b3/image-20231010-200040.png)

*

# Mastercard Send: Payment API implementation

The Mastercard Send execution of the actual payment is performed with the payment API
## Reference Documentation:
## Payment API
[https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-person-to-person/documentation/api-reference/payment-transfer/#api](https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-person-to-person/documentation/api-reference/payment-transfer/#api)

## Example Request - Domestic

Below is the payload example (json) with ONLY THE NECESSARY FIELDS FOR OUR SCENARIO for domestic transactions

```auto
{
  "payment_transfer": {
    "transfer_reference": "LEAP13091440",
    "payment_type": "P2P",
    "amount": "100",
    "currency": "USD",
    "sender_account_uri": "raw:381101085268",
    "sender": {
      "first_name": "Deborah",
      //"middle_name": "",
      "last_name": "Santino",
      "nationality": "USA",
      "date_of_birth": "1999-12-30",
      "account_type": "03",
      "address": {
        "line1": "123 Elm St",
        "line2": "Apartment 9",
        "city": "Chicago",
        "country_subdivision": "IL",
        "postal_code": "60618",
        "country": "USA"
      },
      "phone": "11234567890",
      "email": "test123@abcmail.com"
      /*"government_ids": {
        "government_id_uri": [
          "ppn:123456789;expiration-date=2050-05-27;issue-date=2011-07-12;issuing-country=USA;issuing-place=OFallon"
        ]
      }*/
    },
    //"additional_message": "DEV123456",
    "funding_source": "DEBIT",
    "transaction_purpose": "00",
    //"participation_id": "TERMINAL34728",
    "recipient_account_uri": "pan:5102589999999913;exp=2077-02",
    "recipient": {
      "first_name": "Obi Wan",
      //"middle_name": "",
      "last_name": "Kenobi",
      /*"nationality": "USA",
      "date_of_birth": "1999-12-30",
      "account_type": "03",*/
      "address": {
        "line1": "3015 Denmark Ave ",
        "line2": "Apartment 9",
        "city": "Eagan",
        "country_subdivision": "MN",
        "postal_code": "55121",
        "country": "USA"
      }
      /*"phone": "11234567890",
      "email": "test123@abcmail.com",
      "government_ids": {
        "government_id_uri": [
          "ppn:123456789;expiration-date=2050-05-27;issue-date=2011-07-12;issuing-country=USA;issuing-place=OFallon"
        ]
      },
      "name_on_account": "Jane Smith"*/
    },
    "payment_origination_country": "USA",
    "sanction_screening_override": "true",

        },
    "transfer_priority": "SIP"
  }
}
```

# Mastercard Send: Account Verification

Account Verification is the service to be used to verify the information of the account prior to execute the OCT transaction itself
The intention of this API is Provide information of the Card with standards of the industry
*   AVS verification
*   CCV verification
The execution of this API was requested by Mastercard for the Sandbox and Production Certification Process
It is not in scope for implementation as for November 2023
###   

### Account Verification Documentation from Mastercard
[https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-avs/documentation/](https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-avs/documentation/)

### API reference from Mastercard
[https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-avs/documentation/api-reference/#apis](https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-avs/documentation/api-reference/#apis)

### Example Request

```auto
{
  "account_verification_input": {
    "account_verification_reference": "DEF123456",
    "account_uri": "pan:5102589999999913;exp=2077-08",
    "merchant_verification_value": "9000899911",
    "canada_domestic_indicator": "true",
    "first_name": "John",
    "last_name": "Jones",
    "address": {
      "line1": "1 Main St",
      "line2": "Apartment 9",
      "city": "O'Fallon",
      "country_subdivision": "MO",
      "postal_code": "63368",
      "country": "USA"
    }
  }
}
```

## Example Response

```auto
{
    "account_verification": {
        "request_id": "290562778",
        "resource_type": "account_verification",
        "address_status": "MATCHED",
        "postal_code_status": "MATCHED",
        "cvc_status": "MATCHED",
        "avs_response_code": "X",
        "avs_response_desc": "For U.S. addresses, nine-digit postal code and address matches; for addresses outside the U.S., postal code and address match.",
        "cvc_resp_code": "M",
        "cvc_resp_desc": "CVC2/CSC match"
    }
}
```

# Mastercard Send: Account Info API

The Account Info API is intended to be used to define if a card can be used for the different features available in mastercard:
Send Money
Receive Money
Also to provide information of the Issuer Bank and Country of the Card

This API intention is to be used in OCT Transactions to identify if a Receiver Card is able to receive funds
This API is similar to the Cybersrouce’s Bin Lookup

### Documentation for Account Info Provided by Mastercard
[https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-account-info/documentation/](https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-account-info/documentation/)
### Documentation for Account Info API
[https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-account-info/documentation/api-reference/#apis](https://developer.mastercard.com/mastercard-send-account-info/documentation/api-reference/#apis)
### Request Example

```auto
curl --location --request PUT "https://sandbox.api.mastercard.com/send/v1/partners/ptnr_YhyfbMJswvmznGRaKc7-LrNPIzB/accounts/account-info?fields=metadata" ^
--header "Content-Type: application/json" ^
--header "Accept: application/json" ^
--header "Authorization: OAuth oauth_consumer_key=\"vIMrA4qYmcwh2Hfj8IqPkQxCWe-0SBAOqBv_Ykhd0c58f968%2145ea3bc59e7046c4b2ef6487831399e60000000000000000\",oauth_signature_method=\"RSA-SHA1\",oauth_timestamp=\"1701971308\",oauth_nonce=\"fLt32lRZOGw\",oauth_version=\"1.0\",oauth_body_hash=\"XSWk1lAQos1%2FLnojme%2Fn7PNdpUw%3D\",oauth_signature=\"OHQMfYqwoQH%2FgflCWp%2FH0rlSuBxu%2Bin%2FJIU6Kd7j%2FYjIFFFOsDqUtOgkx%2BjLFdG4G%2Fa%2Bm9SDc6zcS1Yi9GoLyd9qs4Ub8DrVct4fpxPfkEZe66akSgmM1p62w2BN1AMZ%2FwFRSemwepAMcAEh8JO6xSFSFZc94WWynMQWtYtDNU4GjooDWe78tgeiyNcCB5xGADBEcvsKcxKZz0zepM3yCf1sqLi8IPY1b454VulqRuLj1Sl4c6afwmkTQQL5X7pUj44Ou2eYJpGdqaAGBe4gldJ%2BaYBo%2Fa%2BQHMRB0yJeqjuFFr%2B8SKcf2%2F%2B3UsyAmkwY%2B31ec3zYQQ5f8tt7VWl9LQ%3D%3D\"" ^
--data "{
  \"account_info\": {
    \"account_uri\": \"pan:5204530280000034;exp=2027-02\",
    \"amount\": \"1000\",
    \"currency\": \"USD\",
    \"payment_type\": \"P2P\",
    \"enhanced_response\": \"true\",
    \"origination_country\": \"USA\"
  }
}"
```

### Response Example

```auto
{
    "account_info": {
        "type": "DEBIT",
        "brand": "MASTERCARD",
        "resource_type": "account_info",
        "sending_eligibility": {
            "eligible": false,
            "reason_code": "CURRENCY_NOT_SUPPORTED",
            "reason_description": "Currency is not supported for the account"
        },
        "receiving_eligibility": {
            "eligible": true
        },
        "funds_availability": "IMMEDIATE",
        "institution_name": "MTF INTERNAL MEMBER ID - MEXIC",
        "institution_country": "MEX",
        "account_statement_currency": "MXN",
        "acceptance_brand": "MCC",
        "product_type": "Consumer"
    }
}
```

# MicroBlink - BlinkID and BlinkCard

## General Information
Microblink is the company that provides the SCAN - OCR features to the Platform
The product for the ID Scan is blinkID
The producto for the ID of cards is BlinkCard
## List of Documents
The following vedor link provides the list of documents supported by blindID
[https://github.com/BlinkID/blinkid-android/blob/master/documentation/BlinkIDRecognizer.md#northern-america](https://github.com/BlinkID/blinkid-android/blob/master/documentation/BlinkIDRecognizer.md#northern-america)
# Technical Information
The Mobile Layer integrates the Microblink SDK libraries within the mobile layer components, to provide the SCAN - OCR recognize features as part of the CIP flow

Once the Document has been scanned, using the blinkID recognizers provided by this libraries, the Mobile platform disposes the scanned information from the ID, in a object data dicctionary, to be used for Identity Validation Services as well as providing the Compliance Team with the data of the Identity Document the user provided
The following link contains the information of the SDK integration currrently in use:
**Android**: [https://github.com/BlinkID/blinkid-android](https://github.com/BlinkID/blinkid-android)
**IOs**: [https://github.com/BlinkID/blinkid-ios](https://github.com/BlinkID/blinkid-ios)

BlinkCard Library for Xamarin integratin
[https://github.com/blinkcard/blinkcard-xamarin#integration-into-xamarin-forms-project](https://github.com/blinkcard/blinkcard-xamarin#integration-into-xamarin-forms-project)

## Credentials
Microblink provides a dashboard for the managing of the licences.
The production licences are provided by the vendor once the contract has been signed.
In order to avoid charges for usage the productions licences **are only to be used in PROD**
The **trial licences can ge used for QA / DEV or DEMO versions**
To review the licences currently in use / its statusdv
[https://developer.microblink.com/license](https://developer.microblink.com/license)

### For More information on Each Implementation Credentials Review the Following:

*   Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26657](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26657))
*   Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26677](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26677))
*   Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26717](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26717))
*   Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26697](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26697))

# Moova

## General Details
Moova is the logistics company to deliver cards in Mexico Territory
The integration with this company is needed to perform the delivery of cards for Tzune implementation, depending on the Geographic Zone
The full Guide on how to start the Integration is in the following link
[https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/topic/5c404312-979b-47ce-8152-5978b023f4aa/article/515670021](https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/topic/5c404312-979b-47ce-8152-5978b023f4aa/article/515670021)
Moova’s main objetc is a delivery “Envio”
Throghout the life cucle of the interaction with moova, the Delivery will be created and updated, and its status will change
The full cycle of a Delivery is detailed in the following link
[https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/article/545816577](https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/article/545816577)

## Technical details
The specifics for the Integration that needs to be done for the physical personalized cards are the creation of a delivery, and the label from that delivery, that needs to be included in the embosser package for the physical card to be delivered
In order to perform this, it is necesary to use two APIs, one to create the delivery, and another one to obtain the pdf
To Review the Full process and the different examples please review the following link
[https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/article/515637287](https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/article/515637287)

The example to create a basic delivery are detailed in the following link
[https://moova1.atlassian.net/rest/servicedesk/knowledgebase/latest/articles/view/515637287#IntegraciónconlaAPIRestdeMoova-2ndPaso-Conceptos-CreacióndeunEnvío](https://moova1.atlassian.net/rest/servicedesk/knowledgebase/latest/articles/view/515637287#Integraci%C3%B3nconlaAPIRestdeMoova-2ndPaso-Conceptos-Creaci%C3%B3ndeunEnv%C3%ADo)
The information on how to get the label once the delivery is created, are detailed in the following link
[https://moova1.atlassian.net/rest/servicedesk/knowledgebase/latest/articles/view/515637287#IntegraciónconlaAPIRestdeMoova-2ndPaso-Conceptos-ComoimprimirunaetiquetadeunshippingporAPI](https://moova1.atlassian.net/rest/servicedesk/knowledgebase/latest/articles/view/515637287#Integraci%C3%B3nconlaAPIRestdeMoova-2ndPaso-Conceptos-ComoimprimirunaetiquetadeunshippingporAPI)

# Get the shipping label PDF

Once the shipping is generated it is necesary to obtain the label, download the PDF, and put such pdf in the Embosser Files Drive
The API from moova to obtain the label is described in the swagger
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/ff1e3f46-8560-4a9e-b1bf-02b5a3b670ba/image-20211105-202430.png)
The parameter {id} needs to be obtained from the response of the shipping creation, see: Private ([https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26777](https://app.clickup.com/1238940/docs/15tww-59737/15tww-26777))
### Important Notice
*   This API returns a link where the label is stored
*   The link needs to be used to download the pdf and store it in the Embosser Drive

# Details For API

La descripción funcional de uso de cada parametro sale de la documentación de moova (sección “Creación de un Envio” ) = [https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/article/515637287](https://moova1.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/3/article/515637287)
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/94c1bf73-b4a0-45a6-acb9-73dd5cd8300a/image-20211220-204528.png)
### **Para la utilización en Tzune se deben definir los siguientes valores en los campos:**
**scheduledDate:** current date + 2 **working** days
**type** **:** tipo de envío. Debe ser
*   `regular` : Envío que se debiera utilizar normalmente.
**flow:**
`semi-automatic` Es flow crea un envío y deja el envío en moova en estado READY para que los operadores de moova coordinen con los mensajeros la búsqueda de los mismos.
**currency:**  validar si es MXN (string de 3 letras que define el tipo de moneda según el [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Ejemplo: `ars` para Argentina)
**from:** direccion fija de G+D.
Av Santa Rosa No 11, Colonia la Joya Ixtacala, CP 54160, Tlanepantla de Baz, Estado de México,

la entrega es en la zona de embarques de la empresa que esta en la parte trasera entrando por la calle Alejandrina y reportándose en el portón negro.
**5/1/2021 = A confirmar la informacion del contacto**

```auto
"contact": {
            "firstName": "Sergio",
            "lastName": "Miranda Cubos",
            "email": "Sergio.Miranda@gi-de.com",
            "phone": "+52 (55) 5039-3400 Ext. 3483"
```

Extracto de la inforamción como debe ser integrad en la llamada para moova

```auto
   "from": {
        "googlePlaceId": "",
        "addressDescription": "Av Santa Rosa No 11, Colonia la Joya Ixtacala, 54160, Tlanepantla de Baz, Estado de México",
        "coords": {
            "lat": 19.531255061240262,
            "lng": -99.17880072392794
        },
        "street": "Av Santa Rosa",
        "number": "11",
        "floor": "1",
        "apartment": "1",
        "city": "Tlanepantla de Baz",
        "state": "Estado de México",
        "postalCode": "54160",
        "country": "MX",
        "address": "Av Santa Rosa No 11, Colonia la Joya Ixtacala, 54160",
        "instructions": "la entrega es en la zona de embarques de la empresa que esta en la parte trasera entrando por la calle Alejandrina y reportándose en el portón negro.",
       "contact": {
            "firstName": "Sergio",
            "lastName": "Miranda Cubos",
            "email": "Sergio.Miranda@gi-de.com",
            "phone": "+52 (55) 5039-3400 Ext. 3483"
        },
        "message": ""
    },
```

**to:** direccion **_ingresada por el usuario como direccion de entrega de la tarjeta_**
Con las siguientes observaciones para los campos (ver comentarios en mayuscula)

```auto
    "to": {
        "googlePlaceId": "", //NO DEBE ENVIARSE SI NO SE TIENE
        "addressDescription": "marte 4, media luna, coyoacan, 04737,ciudad de mexico, Mexico", //ENVIAR SIEMPRE
        "coords": { //SI CONTAMOS CON LA INFORMACION DE COORDENADAS ES LA MAS APROPIADA
            "lat": 19.301467714267236, 
            "lng": -99.15987818720734
        },
        "street": "marte 4, media luna", //SI ENVIAMOS COORDENADAS, NO ENVIAR
        "number": "4",//SI ENVIAMOS COORDENADAS, NO ENVIAR
        "floor": "1", //ENVIAR SIEMPRE
        "apartment": "C", //ENVIAR SIEMPRE
        "city": "coyoacan",//SI ENVIAMOS COORDENADAS, NO ENVIAR
        "state": "ciudad de mexico",//SI ENVIAMOS COORDENADAS, NO ENVIAR
        "postalCode": "04737",//SI ENVIAMOS COORDENADAS, NO ENVIAR
        "country": "MX", //ENVIAR SIEMPRE
        "address": "marte 4, media luna, coyoacan, 04737,ciudad de mexico, Mexico",
        "instructions": "No funciona el timbre. Llamar antes",
        "contact": {
            "firstName": "Juan", //NOMBRE DEL USUARIO QUE SOLICITÓ LA TARJETA
            "lastName": "Perez",  //DEL USUARIO QUE SOLICITÓ LA TARJETA
            "email": "", //DEL USUARIO QUE SOLICITÓ LA TARJETA
            "phone": "" //DEL USUARIO QUE SOLICITÓ LA TARJETA
        },
        "message": "" 
    },
```

**to.message:** no (null)
**internalCode:** [Vanesa V. Vilas](https://leapfinancial.atlassian.net/wiki/people/5cd5c60bf348990dbc3c2063?ref=confluence) debe confirmar si es necesario
**comments:** no
**extra:** no
**settings:** no
**conf:** no
**conf.assurace:** relativo al seguro. Por el momento ponerlo en null. No implementado por el momento.
**conf.item :** no (información sobre el precio, peso (gramos), largo (cm), ancho(cm) y alto del objeto(cm). En caso de no tener el dato poner null.)
![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/2edaa281-6233-4275-b7ae-89b9c6a2db94/image-20211220-172239.png)

# MTOs



# Intercambio Express

![](https://t1238940.p.clickup-attachments.com/t1238940/c7dd7996-0e74-40f6-9df7-3aefd5e48250/IntercambioExpressLogo.jpg)  
##   

## [https://www.intercambioexpress.com/about-us/](https://www.intercambioexpress.com/about-us/)

## General Details
Intercambio Express is an MTO (Money Transfer Office) from mexican-american origin. 
For more information on the company review: [https://www.intercambioexpress.com/about-us/](https://www.intercambioexpress.com/about-us/)
For purposes of the integration between SACBE and Intercambio Express to be configured as one MTO from the Remittances App the following needs to be taken into consideration:
*   They have already in place an API to connect with their services (see documentation section)
*   They are not able to provide further information about limits due to compliance regulation (privacy policy)
*   The configuration of external (SACBE) fees represents an issue and more work needs to be done to perform this particular point of integration
**Pending Definitions for June 2020**
*   How to map users and its beneficiaries, and the transactions performed with them
*   How to update the previous beneficiaries information
*   How to arrange the previous or external transactions information
**Pending for definition**
*   It is necessary to create a synchronisation mechanism to avoid that when a new bank arrives, or location is not duplicated with previous information, using a mechanism for comparing fields such as names and addresses.
*   It has been agreed with the supplier that a method should be presented to carry out updates to previously loaded information

## Technical Information and Requirements
The following depicts the Requirements that have been idenfified in relation with the Integration with Intercambio Express

**1 . Receive the information of Catalogues whith the Information of the MTO** 

**2\. Perform the Start of the Transaction from the SACBE Platform letting the MTO know that a Remittances to a MExican Person/User has been solicited to them** 

## API Connection Details
### Whitelisted IPs from SACBE:
187.248.69.90 _whitelisted_
 172.100.1.33 _requested on 4/7/2020_

[https://oc.intercambioexpress.com/index.php/s/1vVh0WqGc2LLAOr](https://oc.intercambioexpress.com/index.php/s/1vVh0WqGc2LLAOr)
### URL:
URL to access the API in staging is:
[https://dev.intercambioexpress.com:9770/](https://dev.intercambioexpress.com:9770/) (accessible to whitelisted IPs)

## Associated Model
[structure model diagram](https://www.lucidchart.com/documents/edit/82f4f8bb-a73e-4598-8942-d8a19ac9f81f/0_0)

## Meetings
It has been agreed with CI Bank, to make modifications to support information updates.

# MX

MX is a company that provides financial services analysis and inversion assessments

### Web Site
[https://www.mx.com/company/](https://www.mx.com/company/)

## Integration Details
*   Following is the definition of the architecture objects references along the way in the MX API documentation
*   [https://docs.mx.com/api#api\_architecture\_and\_resource\_structure](https://docs.mx.com/api#api_architecture_and_resource_structure)
*   See the following link for details on how to import the MX APIs to be used in Postman
[https://docs.mx.com/api/guides/postman](https://docs.mx.com/api/guides/postman)
*   The first step towards integration is creating a user and a member, the information for the API is the following: [https://docs.mx.com/api/guides/creating\_a\_user\_and\_a\_member](https://docs.mx.com/api/guides/creating_a_user_and_a_member)
*   At User Interface level, the integration will be held through a widget, that allows to create the user

Below is the information provided by MX team specific for the integration Leap Financial needs to perform
*   Create User: [https://docs.mx.com/api#core\_resources\_users\_create\_user](https://docs.mx.com/api#core_resources_users_create_user)
*   Connect Widget: [https://docs.mx.com/api#connect\_the\_connect\_widget](https://docs.mx.com/api#connect_the_connect_widget)
*   Helpful tool: Configuration Generator: [https://mxcxce.web.app/tools/mx-connect-config-generator](https://mxcxce.web.app/tools/mx-connect-config-generator)
### Widgets
(MoneyMap and **_MXInsights_**): [https://docs.mx.com/api#widgets\_mx\_widgets](https://docs.mx.com/api#widgets_mx_widgets)
H.Way Managed Data:
Create Member: [https://docs.mx.com/api#managed\_data\_members\_create\_managed\_member](https://docs.mx.com/api#managed_data_members_create_managed_member)
Create Account: [https://docs.mx.com/api#managed\_data\_accounts\_create\_managed\_account](https://docs.mx.com/api#managed_data_accounts_create_managed_account)
Create Transactions: [https://docs.mx.com/api#managed\_data\_transactions\_create\_managed\_transaction](https://docs.mx.com/api#managed_data_transactions_create_managed_transaction)
Mobile Guide: [https://docs.mx.com/connect/guides/mobile](https://docs.mx.com/connect/guides/mobile)
**MX Demo Apps:**
IOS: [https://github.com/mxenabled/ios-connect-demo](https://github.com/mxenabled/ios-connect-demo)
Android: [https://github.com/mxenabled/android-connect-demo](https://github.com/mxenabled/android-connect-demo)

## Other Documentation
### Full API Reference
[https://docs.mx.com/api/guides/managed\_resources](https://docs.mx.com/api/guides/managed_resources)

## Certification Process
OAuth: [Submit your application](https://academy.mx.com/hc/en-us/articles/4415043237517-Setting-up-OAuth)
